provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
The authoritative local reference for that config format is section 5:
man 5 sshd_config
Extract a single option without paging the whole file:
man 5 sshd_config | col -bx | grep -A 10 'PermitRootLogin'
